body:
draconym:

draconym:

do you think two pennies is still enough for the ferryman or has inflation driven up the fare

if he makes me use an app I am simply not crossing the river Styx.

With pennies being discontinued, I was concerned for a min about afterlife inflation. And then I realized the fare is so all the dead pennies can cross the river. The ferryman is playing the looooong game.
